title: Creamy Syrian Eggplant Gratin
description: A cultured and velvety Syrian dish featuring roasted eggplant, rich spices, and a creamy sauce, perfect for a brunch mood, served in individual mini cocottes, vegan friendly.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Brush the eggplant slices with olive oil and season with salt, black pepper, paprika, and sumac.
Roast the eggplant slices in the oven for 20 minutes, or until they are tender and lightly browned.
Meanwhile, sauté the chopped onion and minced garlic in a pan until they are softened and fragrant.
Add the vegan cream, nutritional yeast, and a pinch of salt to the pan and stir to combine.
Arrange a layer of roasted eggplant slices in the bottom of each individual mini cocotte.
Spoon some of the creamy sauce over the eggplant slices in each cocotte.
Repeat the layers until all of the ingredients have been used, finishing with a layer of creamy sauce on top.
Cover each cocotte with foil and bake for an additional 15 minutes.
Remove the foil and bake for an additional 5 minutes, or until the top is lightly browned.
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley and serve hot.
